notes: v1.0.4 — Stacker tool merges multiple iteminfo mods into one overlay with RPD mode (safely translates broken byte-patch mods like Ultimate Lantern Reborn, AccessorySocketsMod, Axiom Necklace). Universal Proficiency v2 cross-character equip now works when stacked with other features (muskets on Kliff). One-click Enable Everything force-enables 5 sockets on rings/cloaks/earrings/necklaces/nobility. Drop-in folder export ships pre-built meta/0.papgt. Hex-offset JSON mods no longer crash. iteminfo.pabgh regenerated on every apply so edits don't silently vanish. Plus Custom Item Creator and SkillTree Editor carried forward from the v1.0.4 pre-release. See GitHub release notes for the full list.
